title: Successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length
description: Verify that a user can successfully create an account by providing a unique email and a password that is at least 8 characters long.

title: Account creation with duplicate email is rejected
description: Verify that account creation fails when the email provided already exists in the system, enforcing the unique email business rule.

title: Account creation with password shorter than 8 characters is rejected
description: Verify that account creation fails when the password is less than 8 characters, enforcing the minimum password length validation.

title: Account creation with password exactly 8 characters is accepted
description: Verify that a password of exactly 8 characters meets the minimum length requirement and allows successful account creation.

title: Email uniqueness is validated before account creation
description: Verify that the system checks for email uniqueness prior to creating the account, preventing duplicate registrations.

title: Concurrent registration attempts with the same email are handled securely
description: Verify that when multiple concurrent registration requests are made with the same email, only one account is created and the others are rejected, preventing race condition issues.
